ad_ops.grid_legend: Click a cell IP to copy. Reset bypasses the player cooldown.

reset_confirm.title: Reset container to base image?
reset_confirm.message: Destroys the running container and recreates it from the challenge image. The team's current filesystem changes — including any patches — are wiped, and a fresh flag is delivered. This can't be undone.

ad_ops.no_teams: No accepted teams yet. Once you accept teams from the participations page, their containers will spin up automatically.

empty.title: No A&D or KotH challenges in this game
empty.description: Add a challenge with type Attack & Defense or King of the Hill to use this console.

snapshot.title: Snapshot — {{team}} · {{challenge}}
snapshot.no_changes: No filesystem changes were recorded (snapshot may predate diff capture, or nothing changed).

clear.description: Are you sure you want to remove the attachment of this challenge?
clear.title: Clear Attachment

instruction.amount_double: It is recommended to upload dynamic attachments that are twice the expected number of participating teams.

dynamic.content: Batch upload dynamic attachments, all of which will be distributed with the same file name.
dynamic.format: Please use each flag as the file name for the corresponding attachment.

remote.content: Batch set remote attachments and corresponding flags, with one group per line.
remote.format: Please separate the flag and the URL with a space.

attachment_name.description: All dynamic attachments will be downloaded under this filename
attachment_name.label: Global Attachment Name

blood_bonus.description: Enable blood bonus for this challenge
blood_bonus.label: Blood Bonus

bonus.description: The Triple Blood Bonus refers to the additional points awarded when a challenge is solved by the first three teams. Each team can receive a scoring bonus based on the current points of the challenge. The bonus will be added to the team's score in the form of a fixed percentage.

challenges.delete: Are you sure you want to delete challenge {{name}}?
challenges.disable: Are you sure you want to disable challenge {{name}}?

empty.description: Click the top right to create the first challenge
empty.title: Ouch! This game has no challenge yet.

challenges.enable: Are you sure you want to enable challenge {{name}}?
challenges.bulk_rebuild_confirm: Rebuild the {{count}} challenge(s) with a Failed or Missing-Dockerfile status now? This request waits for each Docker build to finish and may take several minutes.
challenges.delete_selected_confirm: Delete {{count}} selected challenge(s)? This permanently removes them and their flags/instances and cannot be undone.
challenges.activate_selected_confirm: Activate {{count}} selected challenge(s)? Any without a flag set will be skipped.
challenges.deactivate_selected_confirm: Deactivate {{count}} selected challenge(s)? Scoring stops for them until re-activated.

flag.create:
Create flags. Multiple flags should be separated by lines, one flag per line.
Each challenge can have multiple flags. Any configured flags can be accepted.
flag.delete: Are you sure you want to delete this flag?

empty.description: Please add flag via top right corner
empty.title: The flag list is empty

instructions.both: If you need to enable leet flag with <1>[TEAM_HASH], add the <2>[LEET] tag before the flag template string. The entropy of the flag template string will not be checked.
instructions.complex: If you need to enable special characters in flag generation, use <1>[CLEET]</1> instead of <2>[LEET]</2> at the beginning of the string. This may cause injection issues.
instructions.description: Please enter flag template string, leave it blank to generate random GUID as flag
instructions.guid: Specify <1>[GUID]</1> to replace only placeholder here with random GUID
instructions.leet: Leet will be enabled if <1>[TEAM_HASH]</1> is not specified and will change strings in braces based on the template. Please make sure the entropy of flag template is high enough.
instructions.team_hash: If <1>[TEAM_HASH]</1> is specified, it will be automatically replaced with the hash generated by team token and contest's information

flag.title: Flag Management

ad_engine.title: Flags are managed automatically
ad_engine.attachment_note: Attack & Defense and King of the Hill generate per-team flags through the engine, so there is no static flag editor. You can still attach a file below (e.g. the service source) for players to download.

score_curve.description: How the score decays as more teams solve
score_curve.label: Score Curve

challenges.title: Title

traffic_capture.description: Capturing the traffic when the team solves challenges. Platform proxy needs to be enabled
traffic_capture.label: Enable Traffic Capture

workload_spec.title: Aggregate worker workload
workload_spec.section_help: Optionally define one or more trusted-worker services and replicas. While enabled, the workload's image, primary port, CPU, and memory settings replace the legacy fields above.
workload_spec.editor_description: Enter camelCase JSON. Registry images require immutable sha256 digests; replace the example digest. Static and dynamic container workloads require flagTarget. V1 injects RSCTF_FLAG only into flagTarget.service; flagTarget.path is validated and reserved but is not written. The server validates the specification again before saving.
workload_spec.rollout_requires_stateless: Live rollout is unavailable because these services are stateful: {{services}}. Save the definition for future launches, then drain and recreate existing instances deliberately.
workload_spec.rollout_result: Rollout matched {{matched}} workload(s): {{updated}} updated, {{stale}} stale, {{incompatible}} incompatible, {{insufficientCapacity}} without capacity, {{failed}} failed.

ad.title: Attack & Defense
ad.description: Per-challenge A&D configuration. Container image + port + resource caps above are reused; the fields here drive the checker, flag rotation, and player-facing options.

checker_image.label: Checker image
checker_image.description: Docker image speaking the enochecker3 HTTP contract (PUT /putflag, /getflag, /havoc). Phase 1 stores this for later — the auto-checker scheduler ships in Phase 2.

tick_seconds.label: Tick seconds
tick_seconds.description: Seconds per round. 60–180s is the industry norm.

flag_lifetime_ticks.label: Flag lifetime (ticks)
flag_lifetime_ticks.description: How many ticks a planted flag remains valid for attack submission. Default 5.

reset_cooldown_minutes.label: Reset cooldown (min)
reset_cooldown_minutes.description: Minimum minutes between consecutive self-resets per team.

allow_egress.label: Allow external internet
allow_egress.description: Default on — the service can reach the public internet (private and link-local ranges, incl. cloud metadata, stay blocked). Turn off to fully sandbox a service that needs no outbound access.

allow_self_reset.label: Allow self-reset
allow_self_reset.description: Lets the team rebuild their own container to baseline (e.g. when fully owned). Subject to the cooldown above.

allow_snapshot_download.label: Snapshot at game end
allow_snapshot_download.description: Commit + save the team's container as a tarball at end-of-game; teams download for post-mortem study (Docker provider only).

ssh_requires_flag.label: SSH requires a captured flag
ssh_requires_flag.description: Teams can only SSH into their service container after submitting at least one accepted captured flag for this challenge.

empty.description: Click New Division to create the first division
empty.title: No divisions yet

default_permissions.description: The default permissions for teams in this division
default_permissions.label: Default Permissions

get_blood.description: Allows receiving bonus points for blood rewards
get_blood.label: Blood Rewards

join_game.description: Allows users in this division to join the game
join_game.label: Join Game

rank_overall.description: Allows appearing on the overall scoreboard
rank_overall.label: Overall Rankings

container_limit.description: Containers shared by one team (0 = unlimited)
container_limit.label: Team Container Limit

info.delete: Are you sure you want to delete game {{name}}?

divisions.description: Add divisions to enable grouped scoreboard, leave empty to disable
divisions.label: List of Participating Divisions

practice_mode.description: View challenges after the game ends
practice_mode.label: Practice Mode

allow_user_submissions.description: Let logged-in users submit challenges (admin reviews before they go live)
allow_user_submissions.label: Allow User Submissions

summary.description: Will be displayed in the game list
summary.label: Summary

title.description: Excessive length may affect the display effect
title.label: Title

writeup_deadline.description: Hours to submit writeups after game ends
writeup_deadline.label: Writeup Deadline

ad_warmup_seconds.label: A&D warmup (seconds)
ad_warmup_seconds.description: Seconds between game start and round 1. Teams use this gap to SSH in + write initial patches (default 1800 = 30 min). Only applies to games with A&D challenges.

ad_snapshot_retention_days.label: A&D snapshot retention (days)
ad_snapshot_retention_days.description: How long the per-team container snapshots stay available for download after game end. Leave empty to keep forever (the default).

ad_tick_seconds.label: A&D tick (seconds)
ad_tick_seconds.description: Length of one scoring tick. Every A&D service in the game shares this — flags rotate and the checker runs once per tick (default 60).

ad_flag_lifetime_ticks.label: A&D flag lifetime (ticks)
ad_flag_lifetime_ticks.description: How many ticks a planted flag stays submittable — the attack window (default 5).

ad_reset_cooldown_minutes.label: A&D reset cooldown (minutes)
ad_reset_cooldown_minutes.description: Minimum minutes between a team's container self-resets (default 5). Whether a service can be reset at all is per-challenge.

ad_getflag_window_fraction.label: A&D getflag jitter window
ad_getflag_window_fraction.description: Fraction of the tick within which the SLA check (getflag) may fire, after the grace period (default 0.5). Event-wide; each team's check still gets an independent random offset, so the check time can't be predicted.

ad_min_grace_period_seconds.label: A&D min grace period (s)
ad_min_grace_period_seconds.description: Seconds after a round starts (flags planted) before getflag may fire — lets services commit the flag first (default 3).

ad_allow_snapshot_download.label: A&D snapshot download
ad_allow_snapshot_download.description: Snapshot each team's container at game end and offer the tarball for download.

managers.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}}?
managers.empty: No managers assigned to this game yet

notices.delete: Are you sure you want to delete this notice?

empty.description: Click on the top right button to create a new notice
empty.title: No notice yet
Ouch! No teams have joined this game yet

instances.destroy: Are you sure you want to destroy instance {{name}}?
instances.note: Note: Container statistics do not include admin test container and destroyed container

content.markdown_inline_support: Styling with inline Markdown is supported

allow_register.description: Allow users to register new accounts
allow_register.label: Allow Register

auto_active.description: Whether to activate users after registered
auto_active.label: Auto-activate

email_confirmation_required.description: Whether user verification email is required
email_confirmation_required.label: Email Verification Required

email_domain_list.description: List of allowed email domains to register. Separate multiple domains with commas, leave empty to disable.
email_domain_list.label: Email Domain Whitelist

browser_fingerprint.label: Browser Fingerprinting
browser_fingerprint.description: Collect browser fingerprint during login/registration for risk analysis.
browser_fingerprint.warning: Enabling this feature collects additional user device information. Please ensure this complies with your local privacy regulations and update your privacy policy accordingly.

unique_ip_per_team_user.label: Require Unique IP per Team Member
unique_ip_per_team_user.description: Block login when another teammate has logged in from the same IP within the last 24 hours.

unique_fingerprint_per_team_user.label: Require Unique Fingerprint per Team Member
unique_fingerprint_per_team_user.description: Block login when another teammate has logged in with the same browser fingerprint within the last 24 hours. Requires Browser Fingerprinting to be enabled.

unique_per_team_user.warning: These policies block legitimate logins from shared NAT (dorm/office), shared lab machines, or CGNAT exit IPs. Use only when each teammate is expected to log in from a distinct device and network.

use_captcha.description: Verify on login, registration and recovery
use_captcha.label: Enable CAPTCHA

auto_destroy.description: Whether to auto-destroy the old instance when meets the limit
auto_destroy.label: Auto-destroy Old Instances

default_lifetime.description: The default lifetime of the container
default_lifetime.label: Default Lifetime (min)

extension_duration.description: The duration of each renewal of the container
extension_duration.label: Renewal Duration (min)

renewal_window.description: Time window before the container expires to renew
renewal_window.label: Renewal Window (min)

provider.label: Container backend
provider.description: Where challenge containers run. Set at startup (ContainerProvider:Type) — not editable here.

build_registry.title: Build registry
build_registry.description: Where the auto-build pipeline pushes images after a successful docker build. Leave the toggle off to keep built images on the local daemon only.

push_on_build.label: Push built images to a registry
push_on_build.description: When on, every successful auto-build is retagged with the configured server + namespace and pushed.

namespace.label: Namespace
namespace.description: Optional prefix under the server. e.g. myorg → ghcr.io/myorg/rsctf/...

username.label: Username
username.description: Registry user. Leave blank for anonymous push.

password.label: Password / PAT
password.description: Stored XOR-obfuscated. Leave blank to keep the current value.

email.title: Email (SMTP)
email.description: SMTP relay for email verification + password reset. Changes take effect on next send — no restart needed.

smtp_host.label: SMTP host
smtp_host.description: Hostname of the SMTP relay. e.g. smtp.gmail.com

sender_address.label: From address
sender_address.description: Address shown in the From: header. Must be allowed by the relay.

sender_name.label: From name
sender_name.description: Display name shown next to the address. Falls back to the platform name.

username.label: Username
username.description: Auth user for the SMTP relay. Often equal to the From address.

password.label: Password
password.description: Stored XOR-obfuscated. Leave blank to keep the current value.

bypass_cert.label: Bypass TLS certificate verification
bypass_cert.description: Only enable for testing against self-signed SMTP servers.

test_recipient.label: Send test email to
test_recipient.description: Verifies the SMTP credentials above without saving them. Uses the values currently in the form; if you left the password blank, the currently-stored password is used.

email.test_success: Test email sent to {{recipient}}. Check the inbox (and the spam folder).

captcha.title: Captcha
captcha.description: Bot protection on login + registration. None disables the check entirely.

provider.label: Provider
provider.description: Pick the verification mechanism for login + registration forms.

site_key.label: Site key
site_key.description: Public key served to the browser.

secret_key.label: Secret key
secret_key.description: Server-side verification key. Stored XOR-obfuscated. Leave blank to keep.

difficulty.label: PoW difficulty (leading zero bits)
difficulty.description: Higher = more browser CPU on form submit. Clamped 8–48.

captcha.test_description: Probes Cloudflare's siteverify with the configured SecretKey to confirm it's accepted (the SiteKey is browser-side and isn't checked). HashPow has no remote endpoint — the test just confirms the difficulty value is in range.

registry_pull.title: Private registry pull credentials
registry_pull.description: Single set of credentials used by the platform to pull challenge images from a private registry (separate from the Build Registry above, which is for pushing built images).

username.label: Username
username.description: Registry user (or empty for anonymous pulls).

password.label: Password / PAT
password.description: Stored XOR-obfuscated. Leave blank to keep.

proxy_trust.title: Proxy trust (advanced)
proxy_trust.description: Read-only runtime view of RSCTF_TRUSTED_PROXY_CIDRS. Forwarded client IP headers are accepted only from these CIDRs. Leave it empty to trust no proxy; use an exact proxy /32 or a dedicated proxy-only network.
proxy_trust.restart_required: Set RSCTF_TRUSTED_PROXY_CIDRS in the deployment environment and restart rsctf. This page cannot change request-boundary trust.

enabled.label: Override appsettings.json
enabled.description: When off, the ForwardedOptions section of appsettings.json governs. Switch this on to make the values below take precedence.

x_forwarded_for.label: Honour X-Forwarded-For
x_forwarded_for.description: Rewrite the client IP from this header (the usual choice).

x_forwarded_host.label: Honour X-Forwarded-Host
x_forwarded_host.description: Rewrite the request Host header from this proxy header.

x_forwarded_proto.label: Honour X-Forwarded-Proto
x_forwarded_proto.description: Rewrite the URL scheme (http/https) from this proxy header.

forward_limit.label: Forward limit
forward_limit.description: Maximum hops to walk back through the X-Forwarded-For chain. 1 means trust only the immediate upstream.

trusted_networks.label: Trusted networks
trusted_networks.description: Effective CIDRs allowed to set forwarded client IP headers. An empty value means no proxy is trusted.

trusted_proxies.label: Trusted proxies
trusted_proxies.description: Literal IPs or hostnames of upstream proxies (resolved at startup). Usually unnecessary if Trusted networks covers the proxy's subnet.

diagnostics.title: Diagnostics
diagnostics.description: Verify RSCTF is detecting your real client IP. If the detected IP is the proxy's own container IP, X-Forwarded-For is being ignored — every team will appear to share one IP and rate-limits + the 'unique IP per team user' rule will break.
diagnostics.proxy_trusted_yes: Connection peer is trusted; valid forwarded IP headers are honoured
diagnostics.proxy_trusted_no: Connection peer is not trusted; forwarded IP headers are ignored. Check RSCTF_TRUSTED_PROXY_CIDRS.

api_encryption.description: Encrypt sensitive data in some APIs
api_encryption.label: Enable API Encryption
api_encryption.not_available: Web Crypto API is not available

color_palette.description: Color palette generated from the custom color
color_palette.label: Color Palette

footer.description:
Supports Markdown syntax, will be replaced with
on mobile device
footer.label: Footer

logo.description: Used for favicon and the logo on pages
logo.label: Platform Logo

name.description: Platform name will be displayed with ::CTF
name.label: Platform Name

slogan.description: Will be displayed at the top of the page
slogan.label: Platform Slogan

teams.delete: Are you sure you want to delete team {{name}} ?
teams.lock: Are you sure you want to {{action}} team {{name}} ?

users.delete: Are you sure you want to delete user {{name}} ?

reset.content: The user password has been reset, this password will only show up once, please save it properly.
reset.message: Are you sure you want to reset the password for {{name}}?
reset.title: Reset password for {{name}}

import.token_help: Required only for private repos. Use a fine-grained PAT with 'Contents: read'. Not stored.
import.tarball_help: Upload a .tar.gz or .zip of one challenge directory (challenge.yaml + attachments).

audit.title: Audit challenge
audit.archive_available: Original archive captured at upload time.
audit.no_archive: No original archive on file (admin-created or github-sourced).
audit.no_yaml: No challenge.yaml found in the archive.

builds.title: Image builds
builds.subtitle: History of every challenge image build attempt — auto-fired by imports and scans, plus operator-triggered rebuilds.
builds.empty: Builds will appear here once a challenge with a local Dockerfile is imported.
builds.no_log: No log captured for this attempt.
builds.confirm_delete: Delete the audit row for {{challenge}}? The challenge itself and its built image are not affected.
builds.confirm_bulk_delete: Delete the {{count}} selected audit row(s)? The challenges and their built images are not affected.
builds.confirm_prune_failed: Delete {{count}} Failed audit row(s)? Successful builds, in-progress builds, and the challenges themselves are preserved.
builds.select_all: Select all rows on this page

confirm_prune_images.line1: Untag every rsctf/* image on the local Docker daemon that no current challenge references.
confirm_prune_images.line2: Pushed registry copies are not touched. Active challenges keep their images. Useful for reclaiming disk on the RSCTF host.

images.title: Images on disk
images.delete_referenced: Still referenced by: {{titles}}. Deleting it will break the next launch/check until rebuilt.
images.delete_orphan: No challenge references this image — safe to remove.
images.in_use_body: This image is in use by a running container. Force-delete it anyway? The container may break until rebuilt.

badge.build_failed_help: The most recent docker build for this challenge failed. Open Audit to see the log.
badge.not_applicable_help: This challenge ships a published registry image — no auto-build runs.
badge.missing_dockerfile_help: The challenge.yaml pointed at a local Dockerfile path that didn't exist in the archive. Open Audit for the resolved path, fix the source, and trigger a rebuild.
badge.attack_defense_help: Attack & Defense challenge — each team gets a persistent container; players attack other teams and defend their own.
badge.koth_help: King of the Hill challenge — one shared hill; teams race to plant their token in /koth/king and hold it for points.

review.title: Challenges awaiting review
review.delete_warning: This removes the challenge row, its flags, the persisted archive, and any attachments. There is no undo.

repo_binding.title: Repository bindings
repo_binding.subtitle: Register github repositories and the platform discovers events from any .gzevent files inside, then imports each event's challenges. Re-scans run on the configured cadence.
repo_binding.token_help: Required for private repos. Encrypted at rest. Use a fine-grained PAT with Contents: read.
repo_binding.interval_help: How often the background scanner re-fetches the repo. Min 60, max 86400 (24h).
repo_binding.empty: Register one to start auto-discovering events from .gzevent manifests.
repo_binding.no_games: No .gzevent manifests found in this repo yet.
repo_binding.token_decrypt_failed: Stored token can't be decrypted. The DataProtection key may have rotated. Update the token to fix.
repo_binding.push_on_edit_help: When on, admin edits to challenges from this binding are committed back as a fresh challenge.yml and pushed upstream. Requires a PAT with Contents:write scope.
repo_binding.delete_warning: Imported games and their challenge history are kept and detached from this binding. A future binding imports only by stable manifest identity; it will not adopt unrelated games merely because their titles match.

anti_cheat.title: Anti-cheat blocks
anti_cheat.subtitle: Logins blocked by the per-team-user IP / fingerprint policy. Clear a row when a block is a false positive (e.g., teammates sharing a NAT'd public IP).
anti_cheat.empty: When the policy fires it'll show up here. Configure it under Settings → Account.

ad_ops.shell: Open a shell in this container
ad_ops.restart: Reset to base image — wipes the team's changes (bypasses player cooldown)
ad_ops.challenge_off: Disabled on the Challenges page — no scoring or flag rotation

ensure_queued.title: Container reconcile queued
ensure_queued.message: Missing A&D containers will spin up shortly.

restart_queued.title: Reset queued
restart_queued.message: Container will be recreated from the base image in seconds.

attachment.no_selected: Please select at least one file

preview.attachment_downloaded: Pretend the attachment has been downloaded!

games.no_title_time: Please enter title and time of the game

no_file_selected.comment: The selected file will be displayed here
no_file_selected.title: You haven't selected any file
